pvs.author: Kisekikui
pvs.description:
Together by ねこぼーろ 

"If you ask me, it's a very eloquent love song"

says the wiki.

I'm translating songs to practice my Japanese grammar and get used to seeing kanji, so this translation may not be the most accurate, but I do try my best~ If you wanna tell me something that's wrong with the translation, go ahead, be brutal.

Romaji:

gozen san ji nemuimabuta kienai mado
itsunomanika kuruidashita tokei ga
kimi no kage wo uyamuya ni suru
dakara boku wa tobira wo tojita

tobira no oku de wa keshita hazu no kotoba
yume no naka de aou hi ga akereba mou kikoenai

saita saita koborenbakari no koi no hana
kimi ga kimi ga kidzuitenaku to mo kamawanai
kyuukon no kimi wo sakaseru nanika ga boku naraba
kitto itsumademo itsumademo koko de
machitsudzukeru yo

umareta imi wo sagashita sagashiteita motometeita
boku nanka boku nanka kieteshimaeba ii

sonna tawagoto wa yame ni shiyou
omoidashita sora wa nokoshite okou
sayounara ogenki de mata ne
boku wa kawaru kara

saita saita koborenbakari no koi no hana
kimi ga kimi ga kidzuitenaku to mo kamawanai 
kyuukon no kimi wo sakaseru nanika ga boku naraba

kitto

aa koko de boku ni saite okure koi no hana
boku ga boku de aru koto no riyuu ga kimi naraba
kyuukon ga nagasu namida sore wo shimikomase
bokura itsumademo itsumademo koko de
sakitsudzukeru yo

pvs.author: Seich Caro
pvs.description:
【初音ミクAppend】ふたりで。【オリジナル曲/PV】若兩個人。　中文字幕*
作詞：ねこぼーろ 
作曲：ねこぼーろ 
編曲：ねこぼーろ 
唄：初音ミクAppend
本家：http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm14882459

翻譯、字幕：SEiCH*

昨晚做了字幕後打算今天嵌，不過看到在這期間已經有人做了著實一驚...因此還有另一個的翻譯版本，可以對照看看，如有冒犯敬請見諒（鞠躬）

首次上傳的版本在歌曲完結後還多了一大段出來，所以重新嵌入上傳Ver,2，不好意思;口;


－－

UP主：ぼくにとっての、超さわやかなラブソング。（對於我來說，是首超爽朗的Love Song。）
pvs.name: 【初音ミクAppend】ふたりで。【オリジナル曲/PV】中文字幕*V2
